hooks.command: in=$(cat); if printf '%s' "$in" | grep -q 'git commit' && ! printf '%s' "$in" | grep -q 'commit_with_story'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Direct git commit is disabled in this repo. Commit using the helper instead: run story_claude/commit_with_story.ps1 with -Title, -Report and -Prompt. It saves the conversation log to story_claude/ and commits in one step."}}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking commit goes through the story helper
